Pansy Tunnelly is in the town square of Scary, south-east of the Greenfields. Pansy Tunnelly, certain that goblins are in the Shire, sent you to searc…
Bounder Primstone is at the Watch-office in Brockenborings, down the road west of Scary. The Watch-office is near the western side of Brockenborings. …
